response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates high flight risk, compensation misalignment, and likely under-stimulation. Java is listed but not a primary stack (focus is TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), and German is only Basic versus the role's required strong German proficiency. No insurance-sector experience indicated.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background including Java exposure at Altom Consulting
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, agile delivery
Proven architecture, cloud (Kubernetes, AWS), and full-stack capability
concerns: Massive seniority overqualification for an entry-level role
Only Basic German vs. required strong written/verbal German
Java is peripheral; primary expertise is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
